zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham於1382年出生在英國素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素時，他的父親Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham34歲，母親Eleanor Mautravers37歲。他於1427年之前與Ann Bardolf在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1446年8月21日享年64歲，埋葬在英國素瑞令費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham于1382年出生在英国素瑞斯特爾波洛 卡素时，他的父亲Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham34岁，母亲Eleanor Mautravers37岁。他于1427年之前与Ann Bardolf在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1446年8月21日享年64岁，埋葬在英国素瑞令費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham was born in 1382, in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, his father, Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham, was 34 and his mother, Eleanor Mautravers, was 37. He married Ann Bardolf before 1427, in England, United Kingdom. He died on 21 August 1446, at the age of 64, and was buried in Lingfield, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham est né en 1382, à Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Mautravers, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ann Bardolf avant 1427, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 août 1446, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Lingfield, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham 1382 in Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham 34 und seine Mutter Eleanor Mautravers 37. Er hat vor 1427 in England, United Kingdom Ann Bardolf geheiratet. Er starb am 21. August 1446 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in Lingfield, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham è nato il nel 1382 nel Sterborough Castle, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Mautravers, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ann Bardolf prima del 1427, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 agosto 1446, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Lingfield, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobhamが1382年にイギリススリーステルボロウ カストルで生まれた時，父Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobhamは34歳，母Eleanor Mautraversは37歳であった。1427年以前にイギリスイギリスでAnn Bardolfと結婚した。彼は1446年8月21日に64歳で死去し，イギリススリーリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham(이)가 1382년 영국 수리 스터버루그h 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Mautravers(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1427년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ann Bardolf(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1446년 8월 21일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham nasceu em 1382, em Sterborough Castle, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Mautravers, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Bardolf antes 1427, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1446, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Reginald Cobham 3rd Baron Cobham родился в 1382 г. в местности стирбороую кастл, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald Cobham 2nd Baron Cobham было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Mautravers, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Bardolf перед 1427 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 августа 1446 г. в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности лингфиелд, сурри, Англия.

Se casó con Ann Bardolf antes de 1427, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1446, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Lingfield, Surrey, Inglaterra.
